highlights.headline: LA Clippers vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: LA Clippers vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LA Clippers vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights) 2026/03/29 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Bennedict Mathurin scored 28 points, John Collins 22 and Kawhi Leonard 20 as the Los Angeles Clippers got past the short-handed Milwaukee Bucks 127-113 on Sunday for their fifth consecutive win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mathurin scores 28 to pace Clippers past short-handed Bucks 127-113

headlines.shortLinkText: Nets rout Kings 116-99 to end 10-game losing streak

highlights.description: Boston Celtics vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Boston Celtics vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights) 2026/03/29 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jayson Tatum scored 32 points, Payton Pritchard added 28 points and the Boston Celtics defeated the cold-shooting Charlotte Hornets 114-99 on Sunday night for their third straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jayson Tatum, Payton Pritchard help push Celtics past the Hornets 114-99

highlights.description: Orlando Magic vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Orlando Magic vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights) 2026/03/29 ESHEET

headlines.description: — RJ Barrett scored 24 points, Scottie Barnes had 23 points and a career-high 15 assists, and the Toronto Raptors used a 31-point run to rout Orlando 139-87 on Sunday night, handing the slumping Magic their seventh loss in eight games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barnes has career-high 15 assists, Raptors score 31 straight points to rout slumping Magic 139-87
